name: M1050 LRF Rangefinder
description: The M1050R LRF combines the clarity of the M1050 binoculars with dependable, precise range-finding capabilities. It is designed primarily for military personnel and tactical units.
notes: Combines M1050R optics with rangefinder capability. Vendor and grid size unknown. Marked as upcoming content on fandom wiki.
